summary: Iteration 159: 5-Layer Universe Structure + Forgotten Languages Streak/Journal - ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (15/15). Frontend UI verified with all key elements visible. New features: 5-layer universe system (Terrestrial/Ethereal/Astral/Void/Nexus), layer-aware loot/XP multipliers in Rock Hounding, streak system with XP bonuses in Forgotten Languages, glyph journal for decoded history.
seed_data_creation: User has resonance=11 (Ethereal layer), 3/3 glyphs decoded today, streak data present
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5-Layer Universe Structure fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET /api/game-core/stats (includes layer data), GET /api/game-core/layer (layer info based on resonance), GET /api/rock-hounding/mine (includes layer with multipliers), POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action (applies layer multipliers), GET /api/forgotten-languages/daily (includes streak data), POST /api/forgotten-languages/decode (returns streak info and bonus XP), GET /api/forgotten-languages/journal (decoded glyph history). Layer thresholds: terrestrial=0, ethereal=5, astral=15, void=30, nexus=50. User resonance=11 means Ethereal layer (1.3x loot, 1.2x XP). Key data-testids: layer-bar, core-stats-hud, biome-card, depth-1 through depth-5, fl-tab-cipher, fl-tab-mastery, fl-tab-scripts, script-header, streak-badge, glyph-*, layer-indicator, entropy-indicator.

GET /api/game-core/stats includes layer.details: Returns layer object with active_layer, unlocked_layers, all_layers (5 layers), layer details

GET /api/game-core/layer returns layer i.details: Returns active_layer, layer details, unlocked_layers, all_layers based on resonance stat

Layer computation thresholds.details: Verified: terrestrial=0, ethereal=5, astral=15, void=30, nexus=50 resonance required

GET /api/rock-hounding/mine includes lay.details: Returns layer object with loot_multiplier and xp_multiplier

POST /api/rock-hounding/mine-action appl.details: Returns layer info with id, name, loot_multiplier, xp_multiplier applied to rewards

GET /api/forgotten-languages/daily inclu.details: Returns streak object with current, best, multiplier fields

POST /api/forgotten-languages/decode ret.details: Returns streak info and bonus_xp in rewards (all glyphs already decoded today)

GET /api/forgotten-languages/journal ret.details: Returns total_entries, entries list, by_element grouping, streak info

GET /api/forgotten-languages/mastery reg.details: Returns current_tier, tier_name, harmony, total_decoded, by_element, modifiers, tiers, scripts

Frontend: Rock Hounding Universe Layer b.details: Shows 5 segments (Terrestrial, Ethereal, Astral, Void, Nexus) with Ethereal highlighted

Frontend: Layer and Entropy indicators.details: Top-right shows layer indicator and entropy indicator ('Shifting')

Frontend: Forgotten Languages 3 tabs.details: Daily Cipher, Mastery, Scripts tabs all visible

Frontend: Forgotten Languages glyphs.details: 3 glyph cards visible (Goryx, Ithyx, Koryx), all decoded

Frontend: Dashboard regression.details: Mine, Decode, Dream buttons visible at bottom of dashboard

streak_system_details.streak_tracking: Stored in forgotten_languages_streaks collection with last_date, current_streak, best_streak
